de.name: Multi-Warehouse E-Commerce
de.description:
Skalierter Onlinehandel mit mehreren Fulfillment-Standorten — Bestände-
Routing, Carrier-Mix pro Standort, Multi-Channel-Vertrieb (Shop +
Marktplätze + ggf. B2B). Komplexität ist die Hauptdisziplin.

emphasis.overview: Standort-Strategie + Routing-Logik sind die strategische Frage Nummer 1.
emphasis.market: Wachstums-Hebel klar — Internationalisierung, neue Kanäle, Sortimentstiefe.
emphasis.products: Tiefe + Breite. Standort-Allokation pro SKU (welcher Bestand wo, warum).
emphasis.masterdata: Pflichtfelder pro Marktplatz + Sprache. Stammdaten sind das Fundament der Skalierung.
emphasis.channels: Voller Channel-Mix — Shop, Marktplätze, ggf. Wholesale. Marge + Anteil pro Kanal.
emphasis.marketing: Performance-Marketing skaliert, CAC pro Channel klar. Lifecycle-Programme automatisiert.
emphasis.team: Funktionale Teams — Ops, Tech, Marketing, Finanzen. Klare Schnittstellen + SLAs.
emphasis.processes: Quote-to-Cash über Kanäle hinweg + Retouren-Routing über Standorte hinweg.
emphasis.custom_agents: Bestände-Sync minütlich, Routing automatisch, Reports täglich/wöchentlich nach Rolle.
emphasis.logistics: Multi-Warehouse-Routing + Carrier-Mix pro Standort + 3PL-Verknüpfung. Inventur rollend.
emphasis.systems: Voll integrierte Tool-Landschaft. Jede Schnittstelle zählt, jede Latenz kostet.
emphasis.org: Klare Zuständigkeiten pro Funktion + Standort. Wer entscheidet was, wer eskaliert wohin.
emphasis.migration: Cutover über mehrere Standorte koordiniert — pro Lager Freeze-Datum + Hypercare.
emphasis.financials: 5-Jahres-Plan mit Standort-Splits, Capex für neue Standorte einplanen.
emphasis.unit: Kanal- und Standort-spezifische Margen. CAC, LTV, Cost-to-Serve pro Segment.
emphasis.reporting: Tages-Cockpit für CEO/COO/CFO, wöchentliche Standort-Reviews, monatliche Strategie-Reviews.

tasks.title: Logo + Multi-Site-Beleg-Footer
tasks.hint: Logo + Adresse je Standort sauber im Belegwesen hinterlegen

tasks.title: Standort-Stammdaten
tasks.hint: Lager · Carrier-Mix · Cut-Off-Zeiten · Picking-Methode pro Standort

tasks.title: Routing-Logik definieren
tasks.hint: Pro PLZ-Bereich + Produktkategorie — welcher Standort liefert

tasks.title: Bestände-Sync zwischen Standorten
tasks.hint: Frequenz + Schwellen + Reservierungs-Logik

tasks.title: Multi-Channel-Anbindung
tasks.hint: Shop + Amazon + eBay + B2B-Portal — Bestände-Allokation pro Kanal

tasks.title: WMS / Lagersoftware
tasks.hint: WMS-Integration pro Standort + Etiketten-Drucker + Picking-Geräte

tasks.title: Carrier-Mix pro Standort
tasks.hint: Speditionen + KEP-Carrier + Gefahrgut-Setup wo nötig

tasks.title: International — IOSS / OSS / Zoll
tasks.hint: EU-OSS-Quartalsmeldung + ggf. Drittland-Zoll-Setup

tasks.title: Bank-Anbindung (FinAPI/EBICS)
tasks.hint: Mehrere Konten + Marktplatz-Auszahlungen automatisch matchen

tasks.title: DATEV + Konzern-Konsolidierung
tasks.hint: Standort-Mandanten + Intercompany-Buchungen + Konzern-Reporting

tasks.title: Approval-Workflows
tasks.hint: Sonderkonditionen · Kreditrahmen · Standort-übergreifende Freigaben

tasks.title: Test-User pro Standort + Rolle
tasks.hint: Ops · Tech · Sales · Finanzen — Schulungen pro Standort

tasks.title: Cut-Over-Plan rollend pro Standort
tasks.hint: Standort 1 → 2 → 3 mit jeweils 2 Wochen Hypercare

tasks.title: Disaster-Recovery dokumentieren
tasks.hint: Was tun bei Standort-Ausfall · Backup-Routing · SLA-Eskalation

en.name: Multi-Warehouse E-Commerce
en.description:
Scaled online retailer with multiple fulfilment sites — inventory
routing, carrier mix per site, multi-channel sales (shop +
marketplaces + optionally B2B). Complexity is the main discipline.

emphasis.overview: Site strategy + routing logic are the strategic question number one.
emphasis.market: Growth lever clear — internationalisation, new channels, range depth.
emphasis.risks: Single-warehouse risks, carrier outage, seasonal peaks explicitly modelled.
emphasis.products: Depth + breadth. Site allocation per SKU (which stock where, why).
emphasis.masterdata: Mandatory fields per marketplace + language. Master data is the foundation of scaling.
emphasis.channels: Full channel mix — shop, marketplaces, optionally wholesale. Margin + share per channel.
emphasis.marketing: Performance marketing scales, CAC per channel clear. Lifecycle programmes automated.
emphasis.team: Functional teams — ops, tech, marketing, finance. Clear interfaces + SLAs.
emphasis.processes: Quote-to-cash across channels + returns routing across sites.
emphasis.custom_agents: Inventory sync minute-by-minute, routing automatic, reports daily/weekly per role.
emphasis.logistics: Multi-warehouse routing + carrier mix per site + 3PL link. Rolling stock counts.
emphasis.systems: Fully integrated tool landscape. Every interface counts, every latency costs.
emphasis.org: Clear responsibilities per function + site. Who decides what, who escalates where.
emphasis.migration: Cut-over across multiple sites coordinated — per warehouse freeze date + hypercare.
emphasis.financials: 5-year plan with site splits, plan capex for new sites.
emphasis.unit: Channel- and site-specific margins. CAC, LTV, cost-to-serve per segment.
emphasis.reporting: Daily cockpit for CEO/COO/CFO, weekly site reviews, monthly strategy reviews.

tasks.title: Logo + multi-site document footer
tasks.hint: Logo + address per site cleanly in document templates

tasks.title: Site master data
tasks.hint: Warehouse · carrier mix · cut-off times · picking method per site

tasks.title: Define routing logic
tasks.hint: Per postcode area + product category — which site ships

tasks.title: Inventory sync between sites
tasks.hint: Frequency + thresholds + reservation logic

tasks.title: Multi-channel integration
tasks.hint: Shop + Amazon + eBay + B2B portal — inventory allocation per channel

tasks.title: WMS / warehouse software
tasks.hint: WMS integration per site + label printer + picking devices

tasks.title: Carrier mix per site
tasks.hint: Freight forwarders + parcel carriers + hazmat setup where needed

tasks.title: International — IOSS / OSS / customs
tasks.hint: EU OSS quarterly filing + third-country customs setup if applicable

tasks.title: Bank integration (FinAPI/EBICS)
tasks.hint: Multiple accounts + marketplace payouts auto-matched

tasks.title: DATEV + group consolidation
tasks.hint: Site clients + intercompany postings + group reporting

tasks.title: Approval workflows
tasks.hint: Special terms · credit limits · cross-site releases

tasks.title: Test user per site + role
tasks.hint: Ops · tech · sales · finance — training per site

tasks.title: Cut-over plan rolling per site
tasks.hint: Site 1 → 2 → 3 with 2 weeks hypercare each

tasks.title: Document disaster recovery
tasks.hint: What to do on site outage · backup routing · SLA escalation
